name: Activity-rich but low-conversion RM
description: Meets LGs, logs leads, does calling, but closures remain weak.
behavior: Maintains high visible activity levels but struggles to convert leads into closures.
cm_treatment: Use RUSH. Diagnose quality of need analysis, pitch, objection handling, and follow-up.
impact: RM may feel frustrated because effort is high but results are low. Branch trust may get impacted because branch referrals and LG leads are not fully activated.
